<script lang="ts">
  import { Button, type ButtonProps } from '$UI$/button/index.js';
  import { cn } from '$UTILS$.js';

  let { ref = $bindable(null), class: className, ...restProps }: ButtonProps = $props();
</script>

<Button bind:ref type="submit" class={cn('w-full', className)} {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
  import * as FormPrimitive from 'formsnap';
  import { cn, type WithoutChild } from '$UTILS$.js';

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    class: className,
    ...restProps
  }: WithoutChild<FormPrimitive.DescriptionProps> = $props();
</script>

<FormPrimitive.Description
  bind:ref
  data-slot="form-description"
  class={cn('text-sm leading-normal text-zinc-500', className)}
  {...restProps}
/>

{#snippet children({ constraints, errors, tainted, value })}
{@render childrenProp?.({ constraints, errors, tainted, value: value as T[U] })}
{/snippet}

{#snippet children({ errors, errorProps })} {#if childrenProp} {@render childrenProp({ errors, errorProps })} {:else} {#each errors as error (error)}
{error}
{/each} {/if} {/snippet}

{#snippet children({ constraints, errors, tainted, value })}
{@render childrenProp?.({ constraints, errors, tainted, value: value as T[U] })}
{/snippet}

<script lang="ts" generics="T extends Record<string, unknown>, U extends FormPath<T>">
  import * as FormPrimitive from 'formsnap';
  import type { FormPath } from 'sveltekit-superforms';
  import { cn, type WithoutChild } from '$UTILS$.js';

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    class: className,
    form,
    name,
    ...restProps
  }: WithoutChild<FormPrimitive.FieldsetProps<T, U>> = $props();
</script>

<FormPrimitive.Fieldset
  bind:ref
  {form}
  {name}
  class={cn('space-y-2 text-zinc-200', className)}
  {...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
  import * as FormPrimitive from 'formsnap';
  import { Label } from '$UI$/label/index.js';
  import { cn, type WithoutChild } from '$UTILS$.js';

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    children,
    class: className,
    ...restProps
  }: WithoutChild<FormPrimitive.LabelProps> = $props();
</script>

<FormPrimitive.Label {...restProps} bind:ref>
  {#snippet child({ props })}
    <Label
      {...props}
      data-slot="form-label"
      class={cn('text-zinc-100 data-[fs-error]:text-destructive', className)}
    >
      {@render children?.()}
    </Label>
  {/snippet}
</FormPrimitive.Label>

<script lang="ts">
  import * as FormPrimitive from 'formsnap';
  import { cn, type WithoutChild } from '$UTILS$.js';

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    class: className,
    ...restProps
  }: WithoutChild<FormPrimitive.LegendProps> = $props();
</script>

<FormPrimitive.Legend
  bind:ref
  data-slot="form-legend"
  class={cn(
    'font-mono text-xs leading-none font-semibold tracking-widest text-zinc-100 uppercase data-[fs-error]:text-destructive',
    className
  )}
  {...restProps}
/>
